---
title: Data-Driven Transport Planning Hackathon
date: 2026-05-18 14:00:00+01:00
author:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

Welcome to the **Data-Driven Transport Planning Hackathon**!

**Date:** Monday 18th May 2026  
**Time:** 14:00 – 17:00  
**Location:** David Keir Building, Room 0G.533, University of Leeds  

Hosted by Robin Lovelace (University of Leeds, PCTNI team), this afternoon challenge invites you to create data‑driven tools, visualisations, or analyses for transport planning. Use any tools or language; work individually or in teams.

🔗 **Hackathon resources:** https://pctni.github.io/hack/  
📝 **Sign‑up:** https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1CfpigdYH3gLYhoaKraBhDYpmKS1PKefxarIFjp9loME/viewform?edit_requested=true

Refreshments provided. Bring yourself and your laptop!
